title: phyllanthaceae
intro: The Phyllanthaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the Phyllanthaceae family. This family is characterized by its diverse range of species, including trees, shrubs, and herbs, with some species being epiphytes. The Phyllanthaceae family is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world, with a significant presence in Africa, Asia, and the Pacific Islands. The family includes approximately 1,000 species, many of which are used in traditional medicine and have ornamental value.
